description: Per-ticker rolling 24-hr StockTwits message-volume baseline. Populated incrementally by the news-research subagent Pass 3 (Social). Used to compute volume_z = (current_hour_msgs - baseline_mean) / baseline_std. Each ticker accumulates up to 24 hourly samples; volume_z is unreliable until 6+ samples exist.

BABA.notes: seed from 2026-05-24 Sunday probe; baseline still warming until 6 hourly samples
